title: Channel Attention
summary: A technique used in computer vision to focus on specific channels or features of the input data. It sits inside Neural Networks / Attention Mechanism. Compare it with Channel-Wise Attention and Channel Attention Techniques. It opens into Channel-Wise Attention and Channel Attention Extensions.

panels.label: What it is not

panels.label: Common confusion
